query: Find 10 parcels in Kristiansand municipality that intersect both 200-year storm-surge areas and 200-year flood zones, sorted by teigid ascending.

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons within the municipality extent

5.description: get 200-year flood polygons within the municipality extent using the identified return-period value

6.description: find parcels that intersect storm-surge areas

7.description: find parcels (from previous) that also intersect flood zones

8.description: collapse to one row per teigid (count matches)

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_AsText(omrade) AS wkt, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, matrikkelnummertekst, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna LIMIT 5;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [flomsoner]
SELECT DISTINCT "gjentaksintervall" FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal;
